resume_text:
# Alex Rivera

**Email:** alex.rivera.demo@example.com | **Location:** Austin, TX | **GitHub:** https://github.com/alexrivera-demo | **LinkedIn:** https://linkedin.com/in/alexrivera-demo

## Professional Summary

Senior Platform Engineer with 8+ years in software engineering and infrastructure. Experienced building GCP and Kubernetes platforms, implementing SLOs, and driving reliability improvements.

## Why Prism Compute

Prism Compute is a cloud compute platform startup with a modern GCP/Kubernetes stack, remote-first culture, and healthy Series B runway. The senior platform engineer role matches my target scope and compensation.

## Relevant Experience

**Senior SRE — Fictional Payments Co** *(2019–Present)*
- Ran a 40-node Kubernetes platform, primarily on AWS with cross-cloud experience.
- Reduced P1 incident MTTR from 90 minutes to 35 minutes via runbooks and observability.
- Built Terraform modules used across engineering teams.

**Platform Engineer — Demo SaaS Startup** *(2016–2019)*
- Migrated container workloads from EC2 to GKE.
- Implemented SLOs and error budgets for 12 customer-facing services.

**Software Engineer — Example Logistics** *(2014–2016)*
- Built Python services and maintained PostgreSQL/Redis infrastructure.

## Skills

GCP, AWS, Kubernetes, Terraform, Go, Python, Prometheus, Grafana, PostgreSQL, Redis, CI/CD, incident response, SLOs.

## Education

B.S. Computer Science — Demo State University
